hero.title: Dynamic Product Retouching & Scene Creation

steps.title: Upload your raw product image

steps.title: Add dynamic motion content

items.question: What is the Dynamic Product Retouching and Scene Creation workflow?
items.answer: It's a comprehensive AI workflow that handles the entire product visual production process—from professional retouching to background creation to dynamic video content—in one seamless pipeline.

items.question: What types of products work best?
items.answer: The workflow handles all product types—electronics, cosmetics, food, fashion, home goods, and more. It adapts the retouching and scene style to each product category.

items.question: What retouching is performed?
items.answer: The AI applies professional retouching including color correction, exposure adjustment, detail enhancement, reflection cleanup, and imperfection removal.

items.question: Can I customize the scene backgrounds?
items.answer: Yes. You can guide the AI toward specific environments—studio settings, lifestyle scenes, seasonal themes—to match your brand positioning and campaign needs.

items.question: Does this include video output?
items.answer: Yes. The workflow generates both static images and dynamic video content, providing complete visual assets for all marketing channels.

items.question: How does this compare to manual retouching?
items.answer: The AI delivers professional-quality results in minutes compared to hours of manual work, while maintaining consistency across your entire product catalog.
